data.title: U.S. stocks opened, Coinbase rose more than 1.5%, Strategy fell 0.11%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: When the U.S. stock market opened, the Dow Jones Industrial Average opened almost flat, the S&P 500 rose 0.15%, the Nasdaq rose 0.29%, Coinbase rose more than 1.5%, and Strategy fell 0.11%.

data.title: Messari releases Cardano 2024 Q4 report: ADA market value increased by 127% month-on-month
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the Cardano 2024 Q4 report released by Messari, Cardano achieved significant growth in the fourth quarter of 2024, with ADA market value increasing by 127% month-on-month to $30.3 billion, DeFi total value locked (TVL) increasing by 94% month-on-month to $449 million, and stablecoin market value increasing by 66% to $23.2 million. The average daily transaction volume increased by 65% ​​to 71,500 transactions. Cardano also launched the Ouroboros Peras update, which improved network scalability and was compatible with Hydra and Mithril. ADA prices rose by 126% to $0.84, and the market ranking rose to 9th place.

data.title: Cardano's Significant Growth in Q4 2024
data.description:
According to PANews, Cardano experienced substantial growth in the fourth quarter of 2024, as detailed in a report by Messari. The market capitalization of ADA surged by 127% quarter-over-quarter, reaching $30.3 billion. The total value locked (TVL) in Cardano's DeFi ecosystem increased by 94%, amounting to $449 million. Additionally, the stablecoin market cap rose by 66% to $23.2 million. The average daily transaction volume saw a 65% increase, reaching 71,500 transactions.

Cardano also introduced the Ouroboros Peras update, which enhanced network scalability and ensured compatibility with Hydra and Mithril. The price of ADA rose by 126%, reaching $0.84, and its market ranking improved to the 9th position.

data.title: PERRY community voting to burn LP has received official support from FOUR.MEME
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official Twitter of four.meme, the Meme project Perry community has announced the CTO, and the four.meme platform has marked Perry as the CTO project. The community is currently initiating a LP burning voting proposal to four.meme, which has received support from 97.6% of community members. The four.meme official Twitter said that it will support the results of this vote and will assist PERRY in burning LP. Perry will become the first meme project of four.meme to have LP burned.

data.title: "OKX Web3 Consensus Night" was successfully held in Hong Kong, and the consensus on technology and ecology was upgraded again
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News "OKX Web3 Consensus Night" was successfully held in Hong Kong, attracting many Chinese Web3 KOLs, developers and active community members to discuss industry technology innovation, ecological development and future trends. As the organizer of the event, OKX shared in-depth on core topics such as product planning, user experience, OKX Ventures investment dynamics, and globalization process through keynote speeches and industry roundtables, bringing more forward-looking thinking to the development of the industry. Participants not only received exclusive benefits of the OKX Telegram Mini wallet, massive peripherals and tickets to the 2025 F1 Grand Prix, but also witnessed the appearance of a "lion dance" robot dog and a robot wearing an OKX T-shirt. This event deepened industry technology exchanges and ecological cooperation, and further promoted the consensus development of the global encryption industry, injecting more vitality into the Web3 ecosystem.

data.title: Cobie hints at Echo plans for initial coin offering
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Echo founder Jordan Fish (commonly known as Cobie) hinted that the project is planning to launch an initial token offering, aimed at enabling community investors to use private venture capital. Echo is a fundraising platform for Crypto community members that supports collective investment projects and has been used for project financing such as Megaeth, Initia, Ethena and Fogo. (TheBlock)

data.title: Ethereum Layer-2 Platform Abstract Investigates Wallet Security Issue
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Ethereum layer-2 platform Abstract is currently investigating a security issue involving wallet drains after several users reported compromised accounts. This incident follows a significant milestone for the project, which recently deployed one million Abstract Global Wallets (AGW).

Abstract Chain developer 0xBeans announced on February 18 that some users had experienced account compromises. The developer clarified that the issue is not widespread across AGW but is isolated to a specific application, suggesting a potential breach in the Abstract-based game Cardex. Users have been advised to avoid interacting with Cardex until further notice.

The security concern emerged shortly after another team member, 0xCygaar, reported the deployment of one million AGW wallets on February 17. Highlighting the project's achievements, 0xCygaar stated that Abstract has made significant strides in advancing smart wallet technology, emphasizing that the team is just beginning its journey.

In response to the wallet drain issue, 0xCygaar reiterated that the problem is linked to Cardex and urged users to revoke any active sessions. He assured that the issue does not stem from AGW's contracts, which have undergone multiple audits. The problem appears to be related to session key management negligence within the application. The team plans to release audit reports soon to provide further transparency.

This situation is still unfolding, and additional updates will be provided as new information becomes available.

data.title: Nigeria Plans To Tax Cryptocurrency Transactions To Boost Revenue
data.description: According to Odaily, Nigeria is revising its regulations to impose taxes on cryptocurrency and digital transactions as part of efforts to increase fiscal revenue. The Nigerian Securities and Exchange Commission has stated its intention to ensure that all eligible transactions are conducted on regulated exchanges and included in the formal tax system. A bill concerning the taxation of cryptocurrency transactions and the introduction of other taxes has been submitted to lawmakers and is expected to be approved this quarter.

data.title: Grayscale launches single-asset crypto investment fund Grayscale Pyth Trust with a management fee of 2.5%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Grayscale announced on the X platform that it has launched a single-asset crypto investment fund, Grayscale Pyth Trust. It is reported that the management fee rate of this product is 2.5%, and the asset management scale as of February 14 is US$10,948,200.07.

data.title: FTX liquidates AI deep fake video fraud, fraud funds have reached millions of dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Data analysis company Inca Digital found through investigation that a scammer using AI deep fake videos is using fake FTX to liquidate debt fraud companies, involving more than 5.6 million US dollars. The individual or multiple people who committed the suspected crime may use artificial intelligence deep fake videos to cover up their identities in calls with FTX claim buyers. The investigation showed that although these false debt data were not connected to the actual creditors, they were still considered valid by buyers. The fraudulent funds were quickly laundered through non-US exchanges, and it is not clear whether federal law enforcement agencies are tracking the relevant data. (Coindesk)
